line_map.line: Why, fly, why? Where is the fly? Up in the sky!
line_map.needs: style-clash: fly.png (plush) vs fly-sad.png (photoreal) are the SAME character rendered two ways

line_map.line: The fly is shy. The fly can not fly! Try, fly, try!

line_map.needs: style-clash + beetle design mismatch vs bug-helps.png

line_map.line: What is up so high?! POTATO! we can spell it now!

wrong_art.issue: SEVERE cast-consistency failure: this is the SAME protagonist character (Fly) as fly.png (book spread 1, the intro portrait) but rendered in a completely different visual style - photorealistic real housefly instead of the plush-toy design established at debut
wrong_art.fix: regenerate to match fly.png's plush-toy design (fuzzy felt texture, large amber/brown compound 'glass' eyes)
wrong_art.mj_prompt: a plush-toy housefly with fuzzy felt texture and large amber compound glass eyes, slumped on a green leaf with wings drooping, forlorn, matching the canonical plush Fly design, ultra-realistic photograph, dramatic spotlight on deep forest-green backdrop, soft shadows, cinematic, slightly whimsical --ar 3:2 --style raw

wrong_art.fix: regenerate to match fly.png plush design
